metadata.description: Altimate's Claude Code plugin — delegates dbt and warehouse work to the altimate-code CLI agent.

plugins.name: altimate-code
plugins.description: Delegates dbt and warehouse work to altimate-code, a specialized CLI agent with 100+ purpose-built data tools (SQL analysis, column-level lineage, dbt build/test/run, warehouse profiling, FinOps, connectivity to Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks, Postgres, MySQL, DuckDB).
